info.title: Retrieve Multiple Claims API
info.description:
Returns **comprehensive claim details** for claims matching a **dealer**, **date type**, and **begin/end date range**. The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Multiple claims** operation maps to this REST API; see your **SOAP-to-REST field mapping** and **REST API FAQ** attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

ClaimSummary.description: Claim entity returned from **DealerDateTypeSet**. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

dealer.description: Dealer identifier associated with the claim when returned.

workOrder.description: Work order number when present on the entity.

claimStatus.description: High-level claim status when returned by the service.

MultipleClaimsResponse.description: Typical OData-style collection wrapper; the service may return a single object, an array, or another envelope — rely on your integration contract.

value.description: Claim rows returned for the dealer and date window.

message.example: The DealerDateTypeSet key could not be parsed.

get.summary: Get claims by dealer, date type, and date range
get.description:
Retrieves **Claim** entities from **DealerDateTypeSet** using the OData-style key: **dealer**, **date type**, **begin date**, and **end date**.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsRetrMultiClaims/DealerDateTypeSet(Dealer='550012345',DateType='WO',BeginDt='2026-01-01',EndDt='2026-04-01')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `WtyDbsRetrMultiClaims`).

parameters.name: Dealer
parameters.description: Dealer identifier in the DealerDateTypeSet key.

parameters.name: DateType
parameters.description: Date type code governing how **BeginDt** and **EndDt** are interpreted (values are defined by the warranty service contract — confirm with your SOAP-to-REST mapping).

parameters.name: BeginDt
parameters.description: Range start date (format per service contract, e.g. ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`).

parameters.name: EndDt
parameters.description: Range end date (format per service contract, e.g. ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`).

200.description: Claim details returned for the supplied dealer and date window.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The DealerDateTypeSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No claims found for the supplied dealer and date criteria.

error.message: No claims were found for the supplied date range.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
